accordion.description: A set of collapsible panels with headings and content.

alert.description: A callout for displaying important information.

alert-dialog.description: A dialog that requires user response to proceed.

autocomplete.description: An input that suggests options as you type.

avatar.description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user.

badge.description: A badge or a component that looks like a badge.

banner.description: A callout to show site-wide information.

breadcrumb.description: Displays the path to the current resource using a hierarchy of links.

button.description: A button or a component that looks like a button.

calendar.description: A date picker component with range and multi-select support.

card.description: A content container for grouping related information.

checkbox.description: A control allowing the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

checkbox-group.description: Provides shared state to a series of checkboxes.

collapsible.description: A collapsible panel controlled by a button trigger.

combobox.description: An input combined with a list of predefined items to select.

command.description: A command palette component built with Dialog and Autocomplete for searching and executing commands.

date-picker.description: A date picker component built with Calendar and Popover.

dialog.description: A popup that opens on top of the entire page.

drawer.description: A panel that slides in from the edge of the screen with swipe gestures, snap points, and nested drawer support.

empty.description: A container for displaying empty state information.

field.description: A component that provides labelling and validation for form controls.

fieldset.description: A native fieldset element with a legend.

form.description: A form wrapper component that simplifies validation and submission.

frame.description: A framed container for grouping related information.

group.description: A component for visually grouping a series of controls.

input-group.description: A flexible component for grouping inputs with addons, buttons, and other elements.

kbd.description: A component for displaying keyboard keys and shortcuts.

label.description: Renders an accessible label associated with controls.

menu.description: A list of actions in a dropdown, enhanced with keyboard navigation.

meter.description: A graphical display of a numeric value within a range.

number-field.description: A numeric input element with increment and decrement buttons, and a scrub area.

otp-field.description: A segmented input for one-time passwords and verification codes.

pagination.description: A pagination with page navigation, next and previous links.

popover.description: An accessible popup anchored to a button.

preview-card.description: A popup that appears when a link is hovered, showing a preview for sighted users.

progress.description: Displays the status of a task that takes a long time.

radio-group.description: A set of checkable buttons where no more than one of the buttons can be checked at a time.

scroll-area.description: A native scroll container with custom scrollbars.

select.description: A common form component for choosing a predefined value in a dropdown menu.

separator.description: A separator element accessible to screen readers.

sheet.description: A flyout that opens from the side of the screen, based on the dialog component.

skeleton.description: A loading state skeleton for your components.

slider.description: An input where the user selects a value from within a given range.

spinner.description: An indicator that can be used to show a loading state.

switch.description: A control that indicates whether a setting is on or off.

table.description: A simple table component for displaying tabular data.

tabs.description: A component for toggling between related panels on the same page.

toast.description: A temporary notification that appears on screen to inform users.

toggle.description: A two-state button that can be toggled on or off.

toggle-group.description: Provides a shared state to a series of toggle buttons.

toolbar.description: A container for grouping a set of buttons and controls.

tooltip.description: A popup that appears when an element is hovered or focused, showing a hint for sighted users.
